creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
decke       2010-09-29 13:11:08 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/duply       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Duply is a shell front end for the duplicity backup tool.
  It greatly simplifies it's usage by implementing backup
  job profiles, batch commands and more. Who says secure
  backups on non-trusted spaces are no child's play.
  
  WWW:    http://duply.net
  
  PR:             ports/150946
  Submitted by:   Michael Ranner <michael at ranner dot eu>
  Approved by:    beat (co-mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1233    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/sysutils/duply/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/duply/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/duply/pkg-descr (new)
